# Apiiro

## RSA 2026
- **Booth number and hall**: S-3316 on the Moscone Center tradeshow floor.
- **Any updated booth info from the conference floor**: Apiiro is showcasing live demos and discussions focused on AI-driven security and enterprise-grade application protection. A key announcement at the conference is the expansion of their AI coding security agent, Guardian Agent, with a new capability called AI Threat Modeling. This new feature aims to identify security and compliance risks before code is even written. They are also highlighting their "Agentic ASPM" platform and guidance on building "enterprise-ready, risk-based AppSec programs."

## Company Profile
- **Employee count (approximate)**: Apiiro has approximately 120 to 130 employees.
- **Founded year**: 2019.
- **HQ location**: Apiiro maintains its main R&D and corporate headquarters in Tel Aviv, Israel, and has a significant operational presence in North America, centered in New York.
- **Funding stage or public status / ARR if known**: Apiiro is a private company. They have raised a total of $135 million in funding over two rounds. Their latest funding was a $100 million Series B round on November 3, 2022
